title: vulpia myuros subsp. ambigua
intro: Vulpia myuros subsp. ambigua, also known as the lesser six-rowed fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Vulpia myuros subsp. ambigua include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
